login.title: Sign in to Hesabat
login.subtitle: Enter your details to access the dashboard
login.errorGeneric: An error occurred while signing in

signup.title: Register a new company
signup.subtitle: Create your account and start managing your books

accept.invalidBody: This link is invalid or has expired. Contact your company manager to send a new invitation.
accept.invitedAs: You were invited to join as
accept.errorGeneric: An error occurred while accepting the invitation

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

settings.title: Company Settings
settings.subtitle: All your company settings and data in one place

dashboard.distributionHint: Share of account types in the tree

accounts.title: Chart of Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage the company's accounting directory
accounts.loadDefaultsHint: A ready-made Egyptian chart you can edit later
accounts.isGroupHint: Cannot be posted to directly; groups sub-accounts
accounts.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete the account "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

toast.defaultsLoaded: Default chart of accounts loaded successfully
toast.defaultsError: Could not load the default chart of accounts

team.title: Team & Permissions
team.subtitle: Manage team members, their roles, and invite new employees
team.removeBody: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from the team? They will lose access to the company immediately.
team.revokeBody: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation for "{{email}}"? The invite link will stop working.
team.linkCreatedHint: Copy the link and send it to the employee to complete registration. The link is valid for 7 days.

owner.label: Owner
owner.desc: Full control of the system, team, and permissions

manager.label: Manager
manager.desc: All accounting operations without team or subscription management

accountant.label: Accountant
accountant.desc: Add and edit accounts and entries (no deletion)

data_entry.label: Data entry
data_entry.desc: Add data only, without editing or deleting

company.title: Company Profile
company.subtitle: Company profile, registration details, and currency
company.name: Company name
company.activityPlaceholder: e.g. Wholesale trade of electrical appliances

comingSoon.title: Coming very soon
comingSoon.body: We're working hard to add this feature soon to make managing your books easier and more comprehensive.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.subtitle: Define tax types, rates, and link them to the chart of accounts

hints.vat: VAT is applied to revenue invoices at different rates depending on the service nature.
hints.wht: Withholding tax is deducted from the supplier at payment and posted to a 'withholding payable' account.
hints.income: Income / corporate tax is computed on net profit according to the country's law.
hints.payroll: Payroll tax is deducted from employee salaries on progressive brackets.
hints.zakat: Zakat is computed on the zakat base for eligible entities.

taxes.name: Tax name
taxes.seedDefaultsHint: Automatically load the tax types for your company's country (you can edit or delete them later).
taxes.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

currencies.title: Currencies & Exchange Rates
currencies.subtitle: Define foreign currencies and each one's rate against your base currency
currencies.neverUpdated: Rates have not been auto-updated yet
currencies.baseCurrencyHint: Each currency's rate is the value of one unit in your base currency ({{base}}). E.g. 1 USD = 50 {{base}}.
currencies.name: Currency
currencies.noCurrenciesHint: Add the currencies your company deals with so they appear automatically in journal entries.
currencies.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

validation.rateRequired: Exchange rate must be greater than zero

toast.ratesSkipped: Could not update {{count}} currencies (not available from source)

assets.title: Fixed Assets
assets.subtitle: Register company assets and compute their monthly straight-line depreciation
assets.name: Asset
assets.usefulLifeHint: Number of months over which the asset is fully depreciated. e.g. 5 years = 60 months.
assets.noAssetsHint: Add company assets (vehicles, equipment, machinery…) to compute depreciation automatically.
assets.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

validation.costRequired: Cost must be greater than zero
validation.salvageTooHigh: Salvage value must be less than cost
validation.lifeRequired: Useful life must be greater than zero

depreciation.title: Run monthly depreciation
depreciation.hint: One draft depreciation entry will be created for all active assets due in the selected month.
depreciation.nothingBody: No assets are due for depreciation this month (either fully depreciated or already recorded).

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Manage stock items and movements using weighted-average costing
inventory.name: Item
inventory.noItemsHint: Start by adding stock items (goods, raw materials, products…) to track their quantities and value.
inventory.noMovementsHint: Record a receipt, issue, or adjustment for an item; a draft journal entry is created for each movement.
inventory.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

movement.title: Record stock movement
movement.hint: Each movement creates a draft journal entry for you to review and post later.
movement.quantityHint: For adjustments: positive to increase, negative to decrease.
movement.unitCostHint: Purchase cost of a single unit on receipt.
movement.counterpartHintIssue: Usually cost of goods sold or an expense.
movement.counterpartHintAdjustment: Usually a stock-variance account or expense.

validation.accountRequired: An inventory account must be selected
validation.quantityRequired: Quantity must be greater than zero
validation.quantityNonZero: Adjustment quantity must not be zero
validation.unitCostRequired: Unit cost is required on receipt
validation.counterpartRequired: A counterpart account must be selected

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Manage customer records and their subsidiary accounts under Receivables (112)
customers.name: Customer
customers.emptyHint: Add your customers — a subsidiary account is auto-created for each under the customers control account, with its balance derived from posted entries.
customers.controlHint: A group account; a subsidiary account for this customer is created under it automatically.
customers.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Its subsidiary account will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.

validation.controlRequired: Please select the customers control account

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Manage supplier records and their subsidiary accounts under Payables (211)
suppliers.name: Supplier
suppliers.emptyHint: Add your suppliers — a subsidiary account is auto-created for each under the suppliers control account, with its balance derived from posted entries.
suppliers.controlHint: A group account; a subsidiary account for this supplier is created under it automatically.
suppliers.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Its subsidiary account will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.

validation.controlRequired: Please select the suppliers control account

costCenters.title: Cost Centers & Projects
costCenters.subtitle: Define projects, branches, and cost centers with their budgets
costCenters.name: Name
costCenters.noCentersHint: Start by adding a project, branch, or cost center to track its budget.
costCenters.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

journal.title: Journal Entries
journal.subtitle: Create, review and post multi-currency accounting entries
journal.noEntriesHint: Start by creating your company first journal entry
journal.baseCurrencyNote: Base-currency amounts are auto-calculated = amount × exchange rate
journal.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete entry #{{no}}? This action cannot be undone.
journal.postedLockHint: This entry is posted and cannot be edited
journal.minLines: An entry must have at least two lines

validation.amountRequired: Enter a debit or credit amount

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.saveFirst: Save the entry first to attach files

payroll.title: Payroll & Employees
payroll.subtitle: Employee files and monthly payroll runs
payroll.noEmployeesHint: Add employee files with base salary, allowances and deductions.
payroll.noRunsHint: Pick a month and accounts to run payroll for active employees.
payroll.name: Name

form.componentsHint: Fixed monthly amounts — allowances add to gross, deductions subtract to reach net.

run.title: Run Monthly Payroll
run.periodHint: Payroll for all active employees will be computed for this month.
run.netPayableHint: Credited with net pay owed to employees.
run.deductionsHint: Credited with total deductions (required when deductions exist).
run.preview: A draft journal entry will be created for the total payroll.
run.custodyAlert: Note: there are {{count}} open custodies not yet settled. Custodies are not auto-deducted from payroll.

payroll.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

advances.title: Advances & Custodies
advances.subtitle: Employee advances (auto-deducted from payroll) and custodies entrusted to employees

advance.noneHint: Add an advance for an employee, set the monthly installment and advances account.
advance.advancesAccountHint: The advances asset account the installment is credited against each month.

custody.noneHint: Record a custody entrusted to an employee (cash, tools, devices, documents).
custody.settleHint: Upload an Excel file with settlement lines (date, docNo, debit account, credit account, description, cost center, project, amount). A draft journal entry linked to the custody will be created.
custody.settleColumns: Columns: date, docNo, debitAccount, creditAccount, description, costCenter, project, amount

advances.deleteAdvanceBody: Are you sure you want to delete this advance? This cannot be undone.
advances.deleteCustodyBody: Are you sure you want to delete this custody? This cannot be undone.

bank.title: Banks & Cash
bank.subtitle: Manage bank & cash accounts and reconciliations
bank.noAccountsHint: Add a bank account or cash box and link it to a chart account.
bank.noMovementsHint: Record the first movement on this account.

movement.title: Record movement
movement.counterpartHintIn: Where the money comes from (e.g. a customer or revenue).
movement.counterpartHintOut: Where the money goes (e.g. a supplier or expense).
movement.transferHint: A transfer between two of your own accounts posts as one entry.

reconciliation.noReconciliationsHint: Create a bank reconciliation by comparing the bank statement to your books.
reconciliation.selectAccountFirst: Select an account to create a reconciliation
reconciliation.outstandingHint: Movements in your books not yet on the bank statement (outstanding checks, deposits in transit).

validation.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero

bank.confirmDeleteMovement: Delete this movement and its entry?

invoices.salesSubtitle: Issue customer invoices and collect receivables
invoices.purchasesSubtitle: Record supplier bills and settle payables
invoices.noInvoicesHint: Create your first invoice to record sales or purchases
invoices.confirmDeleteInvoice: Are you sure you want to delete this invoice?
invoices.confirmDeletePayment: Are you sure you want to delete this voucher?
invoices.confirmApprove: A posted journal entry will be created and the invoice can no longer be edited. Continue?

reportsPage.title: Financial Reports
reportsPage.subtitle: Reports built from posted journal entries only
